get.description: Returns a paginated list of alert rules visible to the authenticated user. Pinned rules appear first.

parameters.name: alertname
parameters.description: Filter by alert rule name (case-insensitive partial match)

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: Filter by owner or shared user id

parameters.name: silentStatus
parameters.description: Filter by silence state for the current user

post.description: Creates an alert rule. Required and optional fields depend on the `type` value.

put.description: Updates an alert rule. Updatable fields depend on the alert type. Non-admin users can only update their own rules.

delete.description: Deletes the alert rule for admins/owners, or removes the current user access and endpoints for shared users.

get.summary: Acknowledge alert using login link (system user)

post.summary: Toggle silence for current user on a single alert rule

get.summary: Get selectable endpoints for alert rules
Get history for an alert rule
Get triggered/fired alerts for an alert rule

200.description: Fired alert instances or check data

get.summary: Get form data for creating an alert rule
Get data sources by type for alert rule creation
Get Zabbix hosts, actions, and severities

post.summary: Silence filtered alert rules for current user
post.description: Uses the same query filters as the alert rule list endpoint.

post.summary: Remove silence from filtered alert rules for current user
Add users, teams, or endpoints to filtered alert rules

get.summary: Get tags for an alert rule

put.summary: Update tags for an alert rule

get.summary: List behavior rules for an alert rule
Get notification endpoints for an alert rule

put.summary: Add notification endpoints to an alert rule

delete.summary: Remove a notification endpoint from an alert rule

post.summary: Send a test notification for an alert rule

get.summary: Get selectable endpoints for batch notification assignment

put.summary: Add endpoints to multiple alert rules

get.summary: Get user and team access data for an alert rule

put.summary: Add users or teams to an alert rule

delete.summary: Remove a user or team from an alert rule

post.summary: Authenticate user and retrieve access token

400.description: Validation error or incorrect current password

get.summary: Check if data source is connected

otpCode.description: For sms, call, email type the otp verification is required

steps.description: For flow type - array of steps with wait and endpoint types

type.description: Step type - wait for delay or endpoint for notification

timeUnit.description: Time unit for wait type steps (seconds, minutes, hours)

endpointIds.description: Array of endpoint IDs for endpoint type steps

201.description: Endpoint created successfully. Response structure varies based on endpoint type.

get.summary: Get endpoints available for flow creation

200.description: Endpoint details. Response structure varies based on endpoint type (sms, email, telegram, flow, etc.)

otpCode.description: For sms, call, email type the otp verification is required if the value updated in process

steps.description: For flow type - array of steps with wait and endpoint types

type.description: Step type - wait for delay or endpoint for notification

timeUnit.description: Time unit for wait type steps (seconds, minutes, hours)

endpointIds.description: Array of endpoint IDs for endpoint type steps

200.description: Endpoint updated successfully. Response structure varies based on endpoint type.

201.description: OTP code has been sent successfully.

message.example: OTP code has been sent to your endpoint

dataSourceIds.description: Required for sentry, splunk, metabase, zabbix, and dynamic grafana/prometheus/pmm rules

dataSourceAlertName.description: Required for sentry, splunk, metabase, and dynamic grafana/prometheus/pmm rules

Endpoint.description: Endpoint model with different structures based on type. The structure varies depending on the endpoint type (sms, email, telegram, flow, etc.)

value.description: Primary value (phone number, email address, etc.) - used for most types except telegram and flow

chatId.description: Chat ID for telegram type endpoints

threadId.description: Thread ID for telegram type endpoints

botToken.description: Bot token for telegram type endpoints

steps.description: Steps array for flow type endpoints

type.description: Step type - wait for delay or endpoint for notification

timeUnit.description: Time unit for wait type steps (seconds, minutes, hours)

endpointIds.description: Array of endpoint IDs for endpoint type steps

userId.description: User ID who owns this endpoint

EndpointInput.description: Input schema for creating/updating endpoints. Structure varies based on type.

value.description: Primary value (phone number, email address, etc.) - required for most types

chatId.description: Chat ID for telegram type endpoints

threadId.description: Thread ID for telegram type endpoints

botToken.description: Bot token for telegram type endpoints

steps.description: Steps array for flow type endpoints

type.description: Step type - wait for delay or endpoint for notification

timeUnit.description: Time unit for wait type steps (seconds, minutes, hours)

endpointIds.description: Array of endpoint IDs for endpoint type steps

tags.name: AlertRule
tags.description: Manage alert rules, notifications, access, tags, and behavior rules

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: JWT-based authentication endpoints for Skylogs API

tags.name: Data Sources
tags.description: Manage monitoring data sources (Prometheus, Grafana, Sentry, etc.)

tags.name: Endpoints
tags.description: Manage notification endpoints (SMS, Email, Telegram, Teams, etc.)
